title: boehmeria virgata var. sumatrana
intro: Boehmeria virgata var. sumatrana, also known as Sumatran nettle tree or mountain nettle, is a plant species belonging to the nettle family (Urticaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Boehmeria virgata var. sumatrana can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment.
